---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: "Something isn't working as expected"
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include screenshots if relevant.

## 🌍 Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 123, Safari 17 |
| Node.js | `node -v` output |
| npm | `npm -v` output |

## 📎 Additional Context

Any other context, error messages, or console logs.
